Privacy policy for factualSearch.news - how we handle your data

## Privacy Policy

Last updated: February 2025

At factualSearch.news, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your choices regarding your data.

### Our Privacy Commitment

**The short version:** We don't track you, we don't profile you, and we don't sell your data. Your searches are your business.

### What We Do NOT Collect

We do **not** collect or store:

- **Personal identification information** (name, email, phone, etc.)
- **User accounts** (we don't require registration)
- **Search history** tied to your identity
- **Location data** beyond what your browser automatically sends
- **Cookies for tracking purposes**

### What Information We Handle

#### Google Services

We use two Google services that may collect data:

**Google Custom Search Engine**
- Your search queries are processed by Google's search infrastructure
- Google may collect search terms as part of their service
- We do not have access to individual search queries
- See [Google's Privacy Policy](https://policies.google.com/privacy) for details

**Google Analytics** (if enabled)
- Anonymous usage statistics (page views, browser type, device type)
- Data is aggregated and not linked to individuals
- Used only to improve site performance and user experience
- You can opt out using browser extensions like [Privacy Badger](https://privacybadger.org/)

#### Local Storage

We use browser local storage for:

- **Caching news feed data** (refreshes weekly)
- **Caching source database** (refreshes weekly)
- This data never leaves your device

#### Server Logs

Our hosting provider may automatically log:

- IP addresses (for security and abuse prevention)
- Browser type and version
- Referring pages
- Timestamps of visits

These logs are used only for:
- Preventing abuse and ensuring site security
- Debugging technical issues
- They are not used for marketing or profiling

### Third-Party Links

Our site links to external content:

- **Search results** link to third-party news websites
- **Source profiles** link to Media Bias/Fact Check
- **News articles** in our feed link to MBFC

We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites. We encourage you to read their privacy policies.

### Cookies

We use **minimal cookies**:

| Cookie | Purpose | Duration |
|--------|---------|----------|
| Session cookies | Site functionality | Browser session |
| Analytics cookies | Anonymous statistics (Google) | Up to 2 years |

You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect site functionality.

### Data Security

We implement reasonable security measures:

- HTTPS encryption for all connections
- Regular security updates
- Minimal data collection reduces risk

However, no internet transmission is 100% secure. Use this service at your own risk.

### Your Rights

Since we don't collect personal information, there's no personal data to:

- Access
- Delete
- Export
- Correct

If you believe we have your personal data and want it removed, contact us via our [About page](/about/).

### Children's Privacy

This service is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe we have collected such information, contact us immediately.

### Changes to This Policy

We may update this privacy policy occasionally. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of changes.

### Contact Us

For privacy-related questions or concerns, please reach out through our [About page](/about/).

---

|------|--------------|
| Personal data collection | **None** |
| Search tracking | **No** (Google processes searches) |

Your searches are private to you. We're here to help you find factual news, not to monetize your data.

Terms and conditions for using factualSearch.news

## Terms of Service

Last updated: February 2025

Please read these terms carefully before using factualSearch.news.

### 1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using factualSearch.news, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.

### 2. Description of Service

factualSearch.news is a free, curated search engine that helps users find news from sources rated as highly factual by Media Bias/Fact Check. The service:

- Provides access to a Google Custom Search Engine limited to curated news sources
- Displays bias ratings and credibility information from third-party sources
- Is provided "as is" for personal, non-commercial use
- Does not require user registration or account creation

### 3. Privacy

Your privacy matters to us. Specifically:

- **We do not collect personal information** beyond what Google Analytics may collect
- **We do not track individual searches** or build user profiles
- **We do not use cookies** for tracking purposes (only for site functionality)
- Search queries are processed by Google's search infrastructure

For details, please review our [Privacy Policy](/privacy/).

### 4. Use License

Permission is granted to temporarily access and use this website for personal, non-commercial purposes. You may not:

- Attempt to reverse engineer, decompile, or extract source code from the site
- Use automated systems or scripts to access the service in a manner that sends more requests than a human can reasonably produce
- Use the service for any commercial purpose without written permission
- Remove or alter any copyright, trademark, or proprietary notices

### 5. Third-Party Content and Links

This site:

- Displays search results from third-party news websites
- Links to external sites, including Media Bias/Fact Check profiles
- Does not control or endorse the content of linked third-party sites
- Is not responsible for the accuracy, legality, or content of external sites

Bias ratings and credibility assessments are sourced from Media Bias/Fact Check and represent their independent evaluations, not ours.

### 6. Disclaimer of Warranties

THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO:

- Implied warranties of merchantability
- Fitness for a particular purpose
- Non-infringement
- Accuracy or reliability of search results

We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free.

### 7. Limitation of Liability

IN NO EVENT SHALL factualSearch.news, ITS OWNERS, OR AFFILIATES BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING:

- Loss of profits
- Loss of data
- Business interruption

Arising out of or in connection with your use of the service.

### 8. Modifications to Service

We reserve the right to:

- Modify or discontinue the service at any time without notice
- Update these terms at any time
- Change the sources included in our search database

Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

### 9. Intellectual Property

The factualSearch.news name, logo, and original content on this site are protected by intellectual property laws. Media Bias/Fact Check branding and content are owned by their respective owners.

### 10. Governing Law

These terms shall be governed by the laws of the State of South Carolina, United States, without regard to conflict of law provisions.

### 11. Contact Information

For questions about these terms, please contact us through the information provided on our [About page](/about/).

---

## Summary for Users

This is a free tool to help you find factual news. We don't track you, we don't collect your data, and we're not responsible for the content of external news sites. Use it responsibly and verify important information through multiple sources.
